title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to pull, run and chat with GGUF models locally; supports Llama, Mistral, Gemma, etc.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official TypeScript/JavaScript client for the Ollama server—browser & Node.js support with async/await API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK (PyPI: ollama) providing sync/async clients and interactive chat loops.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter that turns any Ollama model into a drop-in LLM for chains, agents, RAG, tool-calling, etc.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (React/Starlette) that talks to your local Ollama instance—multi-user, markdown, code highlight.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub-Copilot-like VS Code extension that uses your local Ollama model for inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI with REPL, conversation history, syntax highlighting and slash commands.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example that combines Ollama LLM with llama-cpp-python embeddings for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library (Maven Central) for chatting, pulling and managing models from Spring or Android.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: FastAPI chatbot, Next.js app, Discord bot, Lambda function, Arduino voice assistant, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU node selector and autoscaling.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that adds :Ollama command for inline code explanation, generation and refactoring using local models.

title: ollama-dbee
summary: DBeaver OSS plugin that integrates Ollama SQL assistant—natural language → SQL with schema awareness.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas and rewrite text via local Ollama models.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Python Slack Bolt bot that answers questions in threads using any Ollama model; deploy via Docker.

title: ollama-grpc
summary: Experimental gRPC server wrapper around Ollama REST API for high-performance streaming in Go services.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile collection (Llama3, Phi-3, CodeLlama, SQLCoder, etc.) with quantization notes.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Reddit post announcing an open-source Discord bot powered by Ollama with slash commands and conversation memory.

title: ollama-hacker-news
summary: Hacker News discussion on Ollama v0.1.32 release focusing on multi-modal (LLaVA) support and Apple Silicon speed-ups.
